title: sosamba
description: This resource pack changes Magma Cube's texture on Starfruit
body: # ![sosamba](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/57630b2f87632f74a33c4652e11b1a12a4f627a3.png) # # 🔒 Change - Resourse pack changes default Magma Cube's texture on Starfruit (funny Starlev's avatar). # # 🌠 Preview ![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83c52bdf7476306ba5be330259af584ca29331d9.png) # ## ❓ Who is sosamba? The sosamba is local word of bleb or blob (_блёба/блёб_), an unofficial Russian word that means slime (slug) from any game. It sounds more gently and cutely in Russian language. "Sosamba" (_сосамба или сасамба_) sounds like suck or sucking off, so because of Kuudra is Magma Cube on Hypixel Skyblock there's name of resource pack :D In my case, I've resourse pack, which changes Minecraft inventory GUI on funny animated Starlev's avatar flag (bleba) and it's kinda a symbol in my media. ``` All these resourse packs are made by _dfar_ ``` #
